blockers.title: Committed Gate 4 audit artifact is stale and contradicts current code
blockers.evidence: .codex/audits/join-form-compliance.review.json:1 still records DO-NOT-SHIP with blockers that current code has fixed: it says male applicants see pipeline consent, but JoinApp now renders it only when values.gender === "female" (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:530); it says the lead copy is "open to everyone", but current copy is women-first (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:254-256); it says "please join me" and trailing separators pass name validation, but current tests reject those cases (tests/unit/names.test.ts:46-59). This is a broken audit trail in the diff being reviewed.
blockers.required_fix: Regenerate or replace .codex/audits/join-form-compliance.review.json with the current Gate 4 verdict before merge. If prior failed rounds need preserving, store them under round-specific filenames instead of the current review artifact path.

non_blocking_notes: npm test and npm run check could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vitest/Astro attempted to write node_modules/.vite-temp and .astro/content.d.ts.
No secrets found in the diff. Targeted em-dash search leaves only documented Arabic org-name en dashes and non-member-facing/source-map punctuation.

spec_compliance.criterion: 1. Gender field Female / Male, Female pre-selected, no Woman/Ally labels
spec_compliance.evidence: JoinApp renders Gender with exactly Female and Male radios; Female is the default state.

spec_compliance.criterion: 2. First name + Last name validation and Title Case
spec_compliance.evidence: Split fields exist; server uses isValidNamePart/fullName; tests cover PRD title-case examples and adversarial junk.

spec_compliance.criterion: 3. Email normalization, disposable rejection, duplicate route without second record/email
spec_compliance.evidence: normalizeEmail/isValidJoinEmail enforce trim/lowercase and deny-list; duplicate createPendingMember returns sign_in before insert and UI does not auto-send.

spec_compliance.criterion: 4. Country fixed single-select stored to country_of_residence
spec_compliance.evidence: Client renders COUNTRIES select; server validates with isValidCountry; member row stores country_of_residence.

spec_compliance.criterion: 5. Looking-for multi-select from LOOKING_FOR stored to looking_for
spec_compliance.evidence: Client uses LOOKING_FOR; server validates list/dedupes; createPendingMember stores looking_for.
dobGate rejects under-13, requires guardian fields for 13-17, creates pending guardianConsents, and non-active pending_guardian accounts are locked out of profile/photo/consent mutations.
Rendered checkbox matches the required sentence and submitJoin rejects missing attestation.

spec_compliance.criterion: 8. Certificate-name confirm step before account creation
spec_compliance.evidence: Confirm stage displays "Your certificate will read" with title-cased fullName; submitJoin is only called from that stage; Edit returns to the form.
Terms required; marketing and pipeline default false; all three consent rows are inserted, with pipeline forced false for non-standard lanes.
Honeypot drops with no side effects; Turnstile runs before rate buckets; per-email/global join caps use rateLimits; boundary validators cover join fields.

spec_compliance.criterion: 11. Em-dash cleanup in targeted member-visible strings
spec_compliance.evidence: No U+2014/U+2013 found in src/portal/*.tsx; edited Arabic title surfaces use regular hyphens, with documented Arabic org-name exception still present.

spec_compliance.criterion: 12. BRAND-4 HowToJoin confirm-token comment does not ship in built HTML
spec_compliance.evidence: The shipped HTML comment was replaced with Astro/frontmatter comments; Astro parser reports no syntax diagnostics.

spec_compliance.criterion: 13. SOURCE-MAP current for /join, /portal, /verify, and Arabic routes
spec_compliance.evidence: SOURCE-MAP.md adds rows for Join, Portal, Certificate verify, and the Arabic route set.

Unit/Convex/E2E test files cover name casing, join validation, join rate rules, guardian branch, shell render, gender default, male pipeline hiding, and honeypot visibility; execution was blocked by read-only filesystem.
No extra product behavior found in the current code diff beyond the specified join-form compliance work.

summary: Code-level fixes appear aligned with the spec, but the branch cannot ship while it commits a stale DO-NOT-SHIP Gate 4 artifact with false evidence.
